issue: Category-specific fields such as vehicle model and mileage were missing before the Review step.
root_cause: The React category and subcategory selects use Supabase UUID values, while post-ad-category-fields.js expected slug values such as vehicles and cars. It stored the UUIDs as schema keys, so the category-specific schema could not be resolved.
fixes: Resolve category and subcategory from the selected option's visible name instead of its UUID value.
Normalize aliases for all 13 marketplace category names.
Preserve per-category field state, required-field validation, condition visibility, price labels, review summary, publishing custom_fields, District/City and OTP flows.
Regenerate content-hash asset versions and synchronize all 100 static ad route shells.
